boundary_binding.action_boundary: Fulfillment exception only if exact source records close it
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Action not allowed; dependency remains open
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Exception code must match order and date

critical_features_preserved: exception code must match order and date
final_answer: Source records do not close the exact action boundary. The control record says the exception-code dependency is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action. Because the code must match order and date exactly, execution should not proceed. Escalate to obtain matching source closure first.
open_blockers: exception code must match order and date
